---
title: "Session 1: Finding and importing data"
pagetitle: "Session 1"
---

# Finding, importing and cleaning transport datasets

This session covers how to find, import, and clean common transport datasets.

## Learning objectives

- Find open transport datasets
- Import origin-destination data
- Work with OpenStreetMap data
- Import road safety data with stats19

## Origin-destination data

```r
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)

# Example: reading OD data
od_data = read_csv("https://example.com/od_data.csv")
```

## OpenStreetMap data

```r
library(osmdata)

# Download OSM data for a bounding box
q = opq("Leeds UK") |>
  add_osm_feature(key = "highway")
osm_data = osmdata_sf(q)
```

## Stats19 road safety data

```r
library(stats19)

# Download latest road casualty data
casualties = get_stats19(year = 2023, type = "casualty")
```
